Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

Packages that use ExtensibleObjectValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  MultimapValidator<K,​V>
    Validates the requirements of a Multimap.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  ArrayValidator<A,​E>
    Validates the requirements of an array of elements.
    interface  BigDecimalPrecisionValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    interface  BigDecimalValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    interface  BooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value.
    interface  ClassValidator<T>
    Validates the requirements of a Class value.
    interface  CollectionValidator<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    interface  ComparableValidator<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable.
    interface  FloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a floating-point number.
    interface  InetAddressValidator
    Validates the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
    interface  IntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of an integer number.
    interface  ListValidator<L extends List<E>,​E>
    Validates the requirements of a List.
    interface  MapValidator<K,​V>
    Validates the requirements of a Map.
    interface  NumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of for a Number.
    interface  ObjectValidator<T>
    Validates the requirements of an Object.
    interface  OptionalValidator
    Validates the requirements of an Optional.
    interface  PathValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Path.
    interface  PrimitiveBooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean value.
    interface  PrimitiveCharacterValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable value.
    interface  PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    interface  PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    interface  PrimitiveNumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    interface  SizeValidator
    Validates the requirements of the size of a collection.
    interface  StringValidator
    Validates the requirements of a String.
    interface  UriValidator
    Validates the requirements of a URI.
    interface  UrlValidator
    Validates the requirements of a URL.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  ExtensibleArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>
    Validates the requirements of an array of elements but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ArrayValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleBooleanValidator<S>
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a BooleanValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,​C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Validates the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a CollectionValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ComparableValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of an integer value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a IntegerValidator.
    interface  ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a NumberValidator.
    interface  ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,​T>
    Validates the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleObjectValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  ArrayValidatorImpl<A,​E>
    Default implementation of ArrayValidator.
    class  ArrayValidatorNoOp<A,​E>
    An ArrayValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionValidator.
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp
    A BigDecimalPrecisionValidator that does nothing.
    class  BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl
    An implementation of PrimitiveNumberValidator for a BigDecimal's scale.
    class  BigDecimalValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalValidator.
    class  BigDecimalValidatorNoOp
    A BigDecimalValidator that does nothing.
    class  BooleanValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of BooleanValidator.
    class  BooleanValidatorNoOp
    A BooleanValidator that does nothing.
    class  ClassValidatorImpl<T>
    Default implementation of ClassValidator.
    class  ClassValidatorNoOp<T>
    A ClassValidator that does nothing.
    class  CollectionValidatorImpl<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Default implementation of CollectionValidator.
    class  CollectionValidatorNoOp<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    A CollectionValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  ComparableValidatorImpl<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ComparableValidator.
    class  ComparableValidatorNoOp<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ComparableValidator that does nothing.
    class  DoubleValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointValidator<Double>.
    class  FloatingPointValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A FloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
    class  FloatValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointValidator<Float>.
    class  InetAddressValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of InetAddressValidator.
    class  InetAddressValidatorNoOp
    An InetAddressValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  IntegerValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of IntegerValidator<Integer>.
    class  IntegerValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An IntegerValidator that does nothing.
    class  ListValidatorImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>
    Default implementation of ListValidator.
    class  ListValidatorNoOp<L extends List<E>,​E>
    An ArrayValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  LongValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of IntegerValidator<Long>.
    class  MapValidatorImpl<K,​V>
    Default implementation of MapValidator.
    class  MapValidatorNoOp<K,​V>
    A MapValidator that does nothing.
    class  NumberValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of NumberValidator.
    class  NumberValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A NumberValidator that does nothing.
    class  ObjectValidatorImpl<T>
    Default implementation of ObjectValidator.
    class  ObjectValidatorNoOp<T>
    An ObjectValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  OptionalValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of OptionalValidator.
    class  OptionalValidatorNoOp
    An OptionalValidator that does nothing.
    class  PathValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PathValidator.
    class  PathValidatorNoOp
    A PathValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveBooleanValidator.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanValidatorNoOp
    A PrimitiveBooleanValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterValidator.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterValidatorNoOp
    A PrimitiveCharacterValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator for doubles.
    class  PrimitiveFloatingPointValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator for floats.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveIntegerValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveNumberValidator.
    class  PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveNumberValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  SizeValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of a SizeValidator.
    class  SizeValidatorNoOp
    A SizeValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  StringValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of StringValidator.
    class  StringValidatorNoOp
    A StringValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  UriValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of UriValidator.
    class  UriValidatorNoOp
    A UriValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  UrlValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of UrlValidator.
    class  UrlValidatorNoOp
    A UrlValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.

    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleArrayValidator.
    class  AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>
    An ExtensibleArrayValidator that does nothing.
    class  AbstractBooleanValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleBooleanValidator.
    class  AbstractCollectionValidator<S,​C extends Collection<E>,​E>

    class  AbstractComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    An implementation of ExtensibleComparableValidator.
    class  AbstractComparableValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ExtensibleComparableValidator that does nothing.
    class  AbstractDoubleValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for doubles.
    class  AbstractFloatingPointValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
    class  AbstractFloatValidator<S>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for floats.
    class  AbstractIntegerValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.

    An ExtensibleNumberValidator that does nothing.

    Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectValidator.
    class  AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​T>
